name: @alfadb/pi-stack
description: alfadb's personal pi workflow + memory infrastructure: extensions, skills, prompts built specifically for pi (similar to how gstack is built for claude-code). Sediment writes to two targets — pensieve (project-local .pensieve/ filesystem) and gbrain default (universal engineering principles); main session is read-only on both. ADR 0012 reverted v6.7's two-track gbrain-source design after gbrain v0.27 multi-source isolation proved unimplemented. Vendors garrytan/gstack as port reference; consolidates alfadb-native multi-agent / sediment / model-curator / gbrain / retry-stream-eof.
